title: Linking open-ocean polynyas and deep convection in the Southern Ocean across CMIP6 models

text:
I am currently a PhD student at the University of Pennsylvania’s Department of Earth & Environmental Science, where I work with Prof. Irina Marinov in the Oceans and Climate Group.

title: Hi! I’m Shunzi Lu
text:
I’m a PhD student studying Physical Oceanography. I’m interested in the dynamics that govern our oceans and their intricate connections with the climate system. My current research focuses on the Southern Ocean, a crucial region that plays a key role in regulating global climate patterns. I am particularly interested in how advanced climate models capture the complex processes in the Southern Ocean, and how can we improve our understanding of climate behavior and its implications for the future.

You can learn more about me here.

title: Ocean Variability Driven by deep Convection in three generations of GFDL Models
Centennial Southern Ocean oscillations and circumpolar links between the Ross and Weddell Seas
